body_txt: A prison-centered installment in a larger work that is otherwise not about prison. It might be an episode in a serial, a sequence in a video game, or a few chapters in a book. Usually this involves one or more major characters being in prison, or at least in noticeably prison-like circumstances . In some cases, they might run the prison. Be on the watch for Clear My Name , Clear Their Name , or a Prison Riot , among other things. When this trope shows up in video games, you can expect the inventory of the player character(s) to be taken away . This results in the player having to use stealth and cunning to avoid the guards , until the hero(es) get their inventory back. Despite this being only a segment of the series, it might end up having permanent effects on the tone of the series from that point on . For example, it may portray major characters as becoming more inclined to crime as a result of said imprisonment . More generally, a prison episode is often used to show and/or begin a Darker and Edgier Tone Shift . Will sometimes overlap with a Courtroom Episode . Compare Bizarro Episode , Sick Episode , Very Special Episode . See also Prison Level (the Video Game equivalent of a prison episode).
